description: This hardwearing footwear from homme is a shoe closet essential, referencing French class and fusing it with modern design details for the perfect semi-formal ensemble. Crafted to capture the season's hottest trends, this pair tops our wish-list!UpperLeather upper with check patterned texture details on the forefoot and midfootLoafer slip-on styling with a tapering toe designElasticated inserts at the sides of the tongue for easy insertion of footReinforced overlay at the heelPadded and perforated footbedUpper adhered to the outsole for maximum durabilityOutsoleTPU outsole with a stacked and decoupled heelHerringbone lugs on the forefootShoe careWipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
